name: Wingfighter
notes: Sky Fortress's fast anti-troop dogfighter — rapid-fire machine guns, the fastest combat aircraft in the roster. Deliberately weak against buildings/walls/defenses (0.5x), unlike Thunder, so it doesn't double as a siege unit. Bonus vs. Air (1.2x) reflects its dogfighter specialty against other aircraft. Heavy aircraft Fuel upkeep (contrast Hot Air Balloon/Glider, which are lighter exceptions).
